item.title: Rainy Night Rollover
item.description: Wet roads and bad luck collide. What challenges did rescuers face in this rainy night rollover?

media:content.media:title: Rainy Night Rollover
media:content.media:description: Wet roads and bad luck collide. What challenges did rescuers face in this rainy night rollover?

item.title: Night Time Hit & Run
item.description: Darkness hides the damage, but the story is clear. What happened in this late‑night hit and run?

media:content.media:title: Night Time Hit & Run
media:content.media:description: Darkness hides the damage, but the story is clear. What happened in this late‑night hit and run?

item.title: Guiding Him to Get Out!
item.description: Step by step, precision matters. How do recovery crews guide a driver safely out of trouble?

media:content.media:title: Guiding Him to Get Out!
media:content.media:description: Step by step, precision matters. How do recovery crews guide a driver safely out of trouble?

item.title: Why Is This Truck Stuck?
item.description: A truck trapped in a tough spot raises questions. What caused the jam, and how can it be freed?

media:content.media:title: Why Is This Truck Stuck?
media:content.media:description: A truck trapped in a tough spot raises questions. What caused the jam, and how can it be freed?

item.title: Have You Ever Seen This?
item.description: An unusual recovery unfolds before your eyes. What makes this scene so rare and unforgettable?

media:content.media:title: Have You Ever Seen This?
media:content.media:description: An unusual recovery unfolds before your eyes. What makes this scene so rare and unforgettable?

item.title: Heavy Load Dangling
item.description: A massive weight hangs in the balance. How do crews secure a heavy load when every move counts?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Load Dangling
media:content.media:description: A massive weight hangs in the balance. How do crews secure a heavy load when every move counts?

item.title: Rotator Saves the Day
item.description: A rotator steps in when heavy lifting is required. How did this powerful machine turn a tough recovery into a smooth save?

media:content.media:title: Rotator Saves the Day
media:content.media:description: A rotator steps in when heavy lifting is required. How did this powerful machine turn a tough recovery into a smooth save?

item.title: Mission Complete
item.description: After setbacks and effort, the job is finally done. What steps sealed the success of this recovery mission?

media:content.media:title: Mission Complete
media:content.media:description: After setbacks and effort, the job is finally done. What steps sealed the success of this recovery mission?

item.title: Off-Road Recovery
item.description: When vehicles stray off the beaten path, recovery gets tricky. What challenges make off‑road rescues so demanding, and how do crews bring them back safely?

media:content.media:title: Off-Road Recovery
media:content.media:description: When vehicles stray off the beaten path, recovery gets tricky. What challenges make off‑road rescues so demanding, and how do crews bring them back safely?

item.title: Dump Truck Crash & Dash
item.description: A dump truck crash sets off chaos on the road. How did the crew respond to the sudden dash for recovery, and what obstacles made it such a high‑stakes job?

media:content.media:title: Dump Truck Crash & Dash
media:content.media:description: A dump truck crash sets off chaos on the road. How did the crew respond to the sudden dash for recovery, and what obstacles made it such a high‑stakes job?
